# MIDI BPM Detection v0.1.0

This first coordinated artifact release contains separate CLAP and VST3 plugin builds for macOS arm64, macOS x86_64,
Windows x86_64, and Linux x86_64. It also contains desktop applications for both macOS architectures and Linux x86_64,
plus the optional Bitwig controller extension used by the tempo-control integration.

## Release assets

- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-clap-windows-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-windows-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-clap-macos-arm64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-macos-arm64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-desktop-macos-arm64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-clap-macos-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-macos-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-desktop-macos-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-clap-linux-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-linux-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-desktop-linux-x86_64.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-bitwig-extension.zip`
- `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-source.tar.gz`
- `SHA256SUMS`

CLAP and VST3 are built and packaged separately. There is no Windows desktop artifact, installer, universal macOS
binary, or combined CLAP/VST3 archive.

## Build and runtime confidence

GitHub Actions builds the complete matrix, checks format-specific dependency graphs and exports, packages notices and
the VST3 corresponding source, and verifies the fourteen-file asset set and checksums. Successful automation is build
and packaging evidence; it is not runtime testing on each target platform.

Maintainer runtime experience is limited to macOS arm64. This note does not claim that a specific plugin format and host
combination was tested against the final release candidate unless that claim is added during draft review. macOS
x86_64, Windows x86_64, and Linux x86_64 remain unverified at runtime. Linux desktop is experimental.

macOS artifacts are unsigned and not notarized. Windows artifacts are unsigned. No signing or notarization is provided
for this release.

## VST3 source and license notice

The VST3 build links the pinned `vst3-sys` binding under GPL-3.0-or-later and therefore has separate binary-distribution
and corresponding-source obligations from the MIT-licensed project source. Each VST3 archive includes the GPL notice
and a source pointer. The shared `midi-bpm-detector-v0.1.0-vst3-source.tar.gz` asset contains the tagged project source,
lockfile, build instructions, and vendored Cargo dependencies needed for the corresponding build. This describes the
release packaging and is not legal advice.

The Bitwig controller extension is optional and supports only the tempo-control integration.
